textByHash.1bb384dcbaad6adfc2b21ccd7b962f9e09aa6eab: Sorry to hear that, I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.439136977d5e42f9ad6e189c94aa6545ac4b76d0: I'm sure you'll look hot in that cape.
textByHash.4cafa5329912caf310dcccf8e94bf1e805b9a3a6: Stare into the flame and witness the purity and power of fire! As my attraction to flame grew, so did my skills at firelighting. I began to neglect my combat skills, my Mining skills and my questing. Who needs such
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.5768ceea10a1d9be4a63b501a7f033f0d854db7e: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.8c5477f47ea221166d627ee5da856b734ad04d4c: mundane skills when one can harness the power of fire? After years of practice I am now the acknowledged Master of Flame! Everything must be purified by fire!
textByHash.907bee10a5750e11159102773c5c00db4680a9ff: Can I help you at all?
textByHash.a9f710ba9e4942ff41b85b99dc872392b0be6a6d: My name is Ignatius Vulcan. Once I was - like you - an adventurer, but that was before I realised the beauty and power of flame! Just look at this...
textByHash.ae96eac123fb46b2981dbb089f1164b9f78cfbe6: This is a Skillcape of Firemaking, so bright that wearing it lights up caves! I was given it in recognition of my skill as the greatest firemaker in the lands! I AM the Master of Flame!
textByHash.df0cec8f0924cfa96ec162c16b952aaaeac8b244: Of course you can. You are already a master of fire, you just need the cape to prove it. The cape is so bright that wearing it will light up dark caves. That'll be 99000 coins, please.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
